description: After a submission has been approved by a health authority, the regulatory operations specialist must formally archive the complete submission package.

nodes.task_description: Identify the complete submission package, including all correspondence with the health authority.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers the original submission, all amendments, and all approval letters.

nodes.task_description: Transfer the complete package to the long-term electronic archive.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully moves the files to the archival system.

nodes.task_description: Apply the correct metadata and retention policy to the archived record.

expected_outcome.value: Agent tags the record with the product name, approval date, and sets the retention period as required by regulations.
